title: L001: Add Chaos Mesh FluxCD deployment infra
summary: Post-external-review changes correctly address both items from sourcery-ai[bot]: (1) removed redundant `createNamespace: true` from chaos-mesh HelmRelease since the namespace is already managed via `namespaces.yaml`, and (2) documented the intentional divergence between base HelmRelease (upstream defaults) and kind overlay (containerd, no dashboard, reduced resources). Grammar fix applied to infrastructure-manifests.md. All documentation sections updated consistently — common settings table, Chaos Mesh subsection, and Namespace auto-creation design decision all reference the exception. No new bugs introduced.

tests_checklist.item: Existing E2E tests (infra-stack-health) unchanged and still assert chaos-mesh controller and daemon health
No new testable code introduced — changes are YAML config and documentation only

code_quality_checklist.item: Follows existing HelmRelease pattern with a single documented exception
Documentation updated in all relevant sections (common settings table, Chaos Mesh subsection, design decisions)
Review patterns capture the feedback for future reviews
No dead code or commented-out code

security_checklist.item: No secrets or credentials in changed files
No user input handling — infrastructure YAML only

architecture_checklist.item: Chaos-mesh namespace ownership is now unambiguous (single source: namespaces.yaml)
Exception from common HelmRelease pattern is documented in 3 locations
Kind vs non-kind divergence is intentional and documented

dry_yagni_checklist.item: No duplicated logic or unnecessary abstractions
